channel.title: Multi-Location on Jonathan Nishikawa — SEO Consultant
channel.description: Recent content in Multi-Location on Jonathan Nishikawa — SEO Consultant

item.title: Coast2Coast First Aid: 19,190 reviews, 150K alumni, 35 locations — and the $5M ceiling its own marketing built
item.description: C2C had every trust signal a Canadian safety training market wants — Red Cross + Heart & Stroke + AHA certifications, 19,190 Google reviews at 4.8★, enterprise clients including CP Rail and Tim Hortons. Revenue: under $5M. The Excalibur audit isolated the gap to four specific infrastructure failures, each fixable in under 90 days.

item.title: TWAG: Six years, 33 cities, and the +104% keyword lift that came from one Cloudflare config change
item.description: Anchor advisor went from #6 to #2 on Wealth Professional Canada’s Top-50 list during the engagement. The national location-page program lifted top-100 ranked URL share from 26% to 55%. Cloudflare + Argo Smart Routing deployment delivered a SEMrush-verified 104% keyword visibility lift.

item.title: HTL Dental: How a 6-location Toronto dental chain made 89% of its website invisible to Google
item.description: A 790-page crawl of a 6-location Toronto dental DSO found 706 non-indexable pages — 89% of the site blocked from Google. The homepage carried a noindex tag. Every page shared the default WordPress meta description: ‘Just another WordPress site.’ The homepage H1 was ‘ABOUT US.’
